team_name: NyayaBot — AI Copilot for Court Judgment Compliance
summary: Develop an AI system to extract key information from court judgment PDFs, generate a structured action plan, and present human-verified data in a dashboard for government use.
key_steps: Extract — AI pulls case details, order date, key directives, parties, and timelines with exact page references
Action Plan — for each directive: comply or appeal, deadline, responsible department, required action
Human Verification — officers review side-by-side with the source PDF, see confidence scores, and approve/edit/reject (only verified data proceeds)
Dashboard — department-wise view of actions, deadlines, and compliance status.
optimization_claims: reduces processing time from days to minutes
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
